families.decision: compare commit ancestry, trees, manifests, branches and data schema; final/v2/date suffixes do not establish canonical status

preserve all independently; BackEndNet5 is owner-confirmed ERP backend paired with Angular and required for feature recovery. Map API contracts, database schemas, identity model and lineage before canonical recommendations
compare commits, project manifests, database schema and UI/backend responsibilities; names indicate product relationship but not duplicate/version identity
treat Xamarin and MAUI repositories as possible product-generation relatives, not duplicates, until API/domain/commit evidence is mapped
high-priority independent product candidate; later compare with Skoola mobile and app repositories discovered in subsequent pages
reference/tooling umbrella only; provenance, license and execution permissions must be reviewed before reuse
